# UiS Store — E-Commerce Website Packages in Kuwait

> UiS Store (uisstore.net) builds white-label, bilingual (English & Arabic) e-commerce
> websites for businesses in Kuwait and the GCC. It is a product of Uniweb IT Solutions,
> a Kuwait-based technology company with 8 years in the market, 60+ clients and 150+
> delivered projects.

## What UiS Store offers

Complete e-commerce websites with KNET, Visa & MasterCard payment integration,
delivery management with GCC countries delivery, inventory management, a powerful
admin panel, SEO setup, and one year of hosting, domain and SSL — all with 0%
commission on sales.

## Packages (per year)

- **Starter — 250 K.D/year**: up to 100 products, English & Arabic, 1 payment gateway,
  0% commissions, inventory & delivery management, GCC delivery, 1 admin user,
  hosting, domain & SSL.
- **Basic — 450 K.D/year**: up to 500 products, English & Arabic, 1 payment gateway,
  0% commissions, inventory & delivery management, GCC delivery, 5 admin users,
  basic SEO, hosting, domain & SSL.
- **Advanced — 850 K.D/year** (most popular): up to 1000 products, English & Arabic,
  2 payment gateways, 0% commissions, inventory & delivery management, GCC delivery,
  10 admin users, standard SEO, hosting, domain & SSL.
- **Premium — custom quote**: everything in Advanced plus Store Management App,
  Point of Sales (P.O.S) system, multiple payment gateways, unlimited products/admins
  and advanced SEO.

## Pages

- [Home — E-Commerce Website Packages Kuwait](https://uisstore.net/): packages,
  pricing, features, FAQ and contact for UiS Store.
- [Sitemap](https://uisstore.net/sitemap.xml)
